headline: Mobile hero compact pass: reduce oversized first-screen card, remove build/update bar, and keep planner failsafe.
focus: Make the first mobile screen feel like a travel editorial app, not a popup advertisement.
notes: Reduced the mobile hero title/card density so it no longer dominates the screen like an ad popup.
Hid the Build notes/beta launch bar from public entry surfaces.
Preserved v204 planner generation fail-safe and mobile dock fixes.
